column1: # Ruling sheet.format.color-brackets: a color bracket NEVER changes the
# rendered glyphs — it recolors the cell — so the string here is identical to
# the no-color code. The color is a SIDECAR exposed by format_value_styled
# (which section's color is picked follows section selection, so a code like
# [Red]0.0;[Blue]0.0 colors negatives blue, positives red). This corpus
# checks the STRING column only (the sidecar color is asserted in the rust
# test). Indexed [ColorN] palette entries are dropped (only the 8 named
